research_basis: OpenTelemetry semantic conventions provide consistent telemetry attributes and naming.
DORA metrics define delivery, instability, and recovery outcomes.
OPA policy testing supports executable governance policy gates.
rules: Telemetry must be persisted as artifacts; console-only logs are invalid.
Every metric must define unit, aggregation, measurement window, threshold, owner, and route_on_breach.
Every telemetry event must bind to at least one artifact or gate.
Every drift breach must route to FIR reevaluation, ECL, SEE/MMD refresh, or STOP_BLOCKED.
Silent failure blocks through STOP_BLOCKED or a valid repair route.
Monitor summary counts must reconcile with event/drift/silent checks.
